name: pech-rate-shield
description: OPT-IN BLOCKING token-bucket rate limiter. Sibling of pech-rate-limiter (advisory). When state/rate-policy.json sets enabled:true, this shield blocks (exits 2) any tool call when the active (session, skill) bucket is empty. Reads buckets from rate-limiter's state/buckets.json when present; gracefully degrades when absent. Default disabled.
